events.label: assistant
events.text:
Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`. 

Summary: missing as-found/as-left calibration data is a documentation nonconformance under ISA calibration practice and site QC — even though the instrument tested out, the gap breaks traceability needed to prove the device was in tolerance before/after adjustment, so it fails the quality gate at the tested/inspected stage. Marked `decision: fail`, `risk: medium`, with corrective action to re-verify and record as-found/as-left values before QC sign-off.
